## Checklist

- [ ] The code stays dependency-free.
- [ ] For a parser change, a test in `test/parser.test.js` is added or updated, and `npm test` passes.
- [ ] Generated or synced files were not hand-edited (band data from `_build_inputs/`, brand colors from the `studyrare-brand` kit).
